title: Expand canonical MVP family from 6 docs to 10 docs
justification: The previous canonical set was useful but too compressed for enduring target layers and runtime-maturity semantics.
source_basis: prior canonical package plus v9-v18 families

title: Restore enduring target runtime layers as a first-class canonical document
justification: Five-layer runtime, memory framework, emotional/consciousness layers, world-state memory, and recovery intelligence remained source-supported but underrepresented.
source_basis: v9-v13 master MVP and specialty docs
impact: Prevents silent loss of major system intent.

title: Restore writers' room, authoring analytics, and evaluation surfaces
justification: These appeared repeatedly in earlier complete MVPs and later governance-adjacent repo docs.
source_basis: v12-v13 writers-room and analytics docs; later governance docs
impact: Reinstates WoS as more than a play-only runtime.

title: Restore operations, deployment, performance, and localization expectations
justification: These concerns were materially present in complete MVPs but barely visible in the prior canonical family.
impact: Prevents the canonical MVP from flattening into pure narrative design.

title: Restore explicit runtime-maturity profile and gate language
justification: v17-v18 sharpened the meaning of a runtime-mature MVP verdict.
source_basis: v17-v18 runtime maturity and implementation gates
impact: Improves closure honesty and future auditability.

title: Close backend transitional retirement residue now
justification: Strongly justified, but requires implementation/test closure rather than documentation-only integration.
impact: Must stay visible as open residue.

title: Provision backend/frontend environment and rerun higher-level route tests
justification: This re-audit hit a real Flask dependency barrier.
source_basis: direct rerun block in this pass

title: Promote broader memory and authoring ambitions to live proof claims now
justification: The ambitions are real but not equally repo-proven in the active slice.

title: Erase writers' room / retrieval overlap by narrative choice
justification: The source set governs the overlap but does not justify pretending it no longer exists.
